text.title: React Hooks Worked Example
text.summary: Before/after: buggy data-fetch component with stale closure + sync-via-effect → clean component with abort signal + derivation.

section.title: Before — buggy
After — fixed
section.note: Three rules applied: unconditional-call (early return moved below hooks), exhaustive-deps (userId added), cleanup-mandatory (AbortController), derive-not-sync (fullName computed inline).

text.reference: Reusable custom hook with same shape
